item.text:
Everyone must use the safety equipment when required |at*on*in*with| work.

Ear protectors are used |to*for*at*on| protect your ears in the engine room.

A spanner is |a*some*any*-| hand tool for turning nuts and bolts.

Goggles protect your eyes |from*for*on*with| damage and dust.

Pliers are a hand tool for taking |out*into*from*on| nails and cutting wire.

A hammer is used |for*at*on*to| knocking in nails.

A nut is a metal object with a hole |in*outside*out of*into| the middle.

You may not drill holes |in*into*on*through| walls.

A screwdriver is a hand tool used for |turning*turn*to turn*turned| screws.
